victim.value: Baby animals dying from temperature exposure after hatching
victim.quote: They weren't surviving the temperature they came out to. The poor tortoise watched as all the babies died

closed_world.value: The mill that comes alive at night
closed_world.quote: It was like the mill and machinery in it, had their own minds. As if at night the mill came alive.

investigator.value: First-person narrator experiencing supernatural events in the mill
investigator.quote: I guess that happens though when you're holding up a piece of heavy machinery for about an hour.

red_herring.value: Supernatural mill machinery appearing to have its own mind, misdirecting from actual mystery elements
red_herring.quote: It was like the mill and machinery in it, had their own minds. As if at night the mill came alive.

clue_fairness.value: Tortoise delivers first clue, glowing spots appear above machine and switch as guidance markers
clue_fairness.quote: to the real tortoise, who tells the first clue

reveal_mechanic.value: Supernatural shimmer reveals itself as death personified through visual manifestation
reveal_mechanic.quote: It was the innocence of a child, the whisper of the wind, the breath of death, and the shimmer of a life.

investigator_wound.value: Physical exhaustion and emotional vulnerability from witnessing mass death of newborn creatures
investigator_wound.quote: The poor tortoise watched as all the babies died before her. I could no longer just stand and watch.

_meta.title: ebook c kelemen the birth of death
